title: Integrate Scouty desktop lease API for multi-tool focus management
description:
Integrate simemu with scouty's desktop lease APIs so focus-sensitive tools can coordinate cleanly on the same machine.

Acceptance criteria:
- simemu can request, activate, update, and release scouty leases reliably
- lease metadata carries enough context for user-app restoration and operator debugging
- integration is verified against scouty's current API rather than a hypothetical future browser tool
- the workflow is documented as a shared-desktop contract for onlytools and vykean
